'''鈭歡-sh-f-m''' ('''kagashfemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hamstring|hamstring]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-sh-f-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hamstring|hamstring]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-sh-f-m
|-
! Lemma
| kagashfemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigashfemoko|thigashfemoko]] || [[word:jigashfemoko|jigashfemoko]] || [[word:shigashfemoko|shigashfemoko]] || [[word:kigashfemoko|kigashfemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugashfemoko|thuthugashfemoko]] || [[word:jujugashfemoko|jujugashfemoko]] || [[word:shushugashfemoko|shushugashfemoko]] || [[word:kukugashfemoko|kukugashfemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugashfemoko|thugashfemoko]] || [[word:jugashfemoko|jugashfemoko]] || [[word:shugashfemoko|shugashfemoko]] || [[word:kugashfemoko|kugashfemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugashfemoko|thugashfemoko]] || [[word:jugashfemoko|jugashfemoko]] || [[word:shugashfemoko|shugashfemoko]] || [[word:kugashfemoko|kugashfemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegashfemoko|thegashfemoko]] || [[word:jegashfemoko|jegashfemoko]] || [[word:shegashfemoko|shegashfemoko]] || [[word:kegashfemoko|kegashfemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogashfemoko|thothogashfemoko]] || [[word:jojogashfemoko|jojogashfemoko]] || [[word:shoshogashfemoko|shoshogashfemoko]] || [[word:kokogashfemoko|kokogashfemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogashfemoko|thogashfemoko]] || [[word:jogashfemoko|jogashfemoko]] || [[word:shogashfemoko|shogashfemoko]] || [[word:kogashfemoko|kogashfemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogashfemoko|thogashfemoko]] || [[word:jogashfemoko|jogashfemoko]] || [[word:shogashfemoko|shogashfemoko]] || [[word:kogashfemoko|kogashfemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gashfemoko|th忙gashfemoko]] || [[word:j忙gashfemoko|j忙gashfemoko]] || [[word:sh忙gashfemoko|sh忙gashfemoko]] || [[word:k忙gashfemoko|k忙gashfemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagashfemoko|thathagashfemoko]] || [[word:jajagashfemoko|jajagashfemoko]] || [[word:shashagashfemoko|shashagashfemoko]] || [[word:kakagashfemoko|kakagashfemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagashfemoko|thagashfemoko]] || [[word:jagashfemoko|jagashfemoko]] || [[word:shagashfemoko|shagashfemoko]] || [[word:kagashfemoko|kagashfemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagashfemoko|thagashfemoko]] || [[word:jagashfemoko|jagashfemoko]] || [[word:shagashfemoko|shagashfemoko]] || [[word:kagashfemoko|kagashfemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
